channel.title: Adarsh | Technical Articles & Logs
channel.description: Technical essays, architectural reviews, and tutorials on systems design.

item.title: Configuring Headless WordPress via WP GraphQL
item.description: A deep dive into setting up a secure, query-optimized headless WordPress database connected to a React Vite client using GraphQL resolvers.

item.title: REST and gRPC Design Patterns for High Throughput Apps
item.description: An architectural review of API protocols, schema validation libraries, and rate-limiting structures to maintain 99.9% platform availability.
